scripts.test: npm run test:typescript && npm run test:python
scripts.coverage:python: python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install --quiet --disable-pip-version-check -r python/requirements-dev.txt && PYTHONPATH=python/src .venv/bin/python -m coverage run --rcfile=.coveragerc python/tests/test_engine.py && .venv/bin/python -m coverage report && .venv/bin/python -m coverage json -o coverage/python-coverage.json
scripts.coverage: npm run coverage:typescript && npm run coverage:python && npm run coverage:human
